summary.intent: Address and resolve PR review comments on https://github.com/moltis-org/moltis/pull/484.
summary.outcome: Applied three reviewer comments to crates/skills/src/parse.rs, verified tests still pass, committed and pushed the fixes.

repo: PR review workflow uses GitHub conversations that need to be explicitly resolved after applying fixes.
The moltis repo uses worktrees under /Users/penso/.superset/worktrees/moltis/ for branch isolation.

code.finding: Error message tests check substrings ('no slug provided', 'also invalid') rather than full strings, making them resilient to minor message rewording.

workflow: After applying review fixes, verify tests before committing to avoid pushing broken code.
Resolve GitHub PR conversations as part of the same session that applies the fixes.
